name: market-scan
prompt:
Run your complete weekly market scan now.

1. Batch price pull — Call mcp_finnhub_get_quote_batch with all 9 symbols: NVDA, MSFT, GOOGL, SPY, QQQ, BTC, ETH, GOLD, SILVER.
2. Derive weekly % change from Finnhub data.
3. Web search for context on the biggest movers (earnings, macro events, news).
4. Rank by % change — identify best 3 and worst 3.
5. Deliver the short summary to Telegram via send_message.
6. Write the full table to Obsidian at wiki/synthesis/market-scan-{YYYY-MM-DD}.md.
